ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number associated with the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., Unprovoked, Provoked) */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Specific area of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the incident */,
  "activity" INTEGER /* Activity being conducted at the time of the incident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual involved in the incident */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual involved */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual involved */,
  "injury" INTEGER /* Description of injuries sustained */,
  "fatal_y_n" TEXT /* Indicates if the incident was fatal (Y/N) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "species" INTEGER /* Species of shark involved */,
  "investigator_or_source" INTEGER /* Investigator or source of the report */,
  "pdf" TEXT /* PDF document related to the incident */,
  "original_order" INTEGER /* Original order in reporting */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., Open, Closed, Under Review) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the incident */,
  "water_conditions" TEXT /* Water conditions during the incident */,
  "witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_investigator_or_source FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_or_source") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_area FOREIGN KEY ("area") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_injury FOREIGN KEY ("injury") REFERENCES injuries ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_activity FOREIGN KEY ("activity") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the shark species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Taxonomic description of the species */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of the species in meters */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Typical diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "coastline_length" REAL /* Length of the coastline in kilometers */,
  "marine_protected_areas" INTEGER /* Number of marine protected areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Surfing, Body boarding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the activity (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Equipment typically required for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality in the area (e.g., Good, Moderate, Poor) */,
  "marine_life_density" TEXT /* Density of marine life in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Gender designation (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "pronouns" TEXT /* Pronouns used for the gender (e.g., He/Him, She/Her, They/Them) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury type */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., Minor, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "treatment_required" TEXT /* Indicates if medical treatment was required (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator or source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the investigator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the investigator (e.g., Marine Biology, Emergency Response) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdfs" (
  "pdf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDF entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the PDF document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Report, Photo, Video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdfs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "original_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID */,
  "original_order" INTEGER /* Original order of the report */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., Local News, Government Agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_original_orders_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
